cookieConsent.title: We value your privacy
cookieConsent.description: We use cookies to ensure the site works, analyze usage and improve your experience. You can accept all, reject non-essential ones or customize your choices. Learn more in our
cookieConsent.necessaryDesc: Required for the site to work, such as authentication and security. These cannot be disabled.
cookieConsent.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how you use DailyTracker so we can improve the platform. Data is aggregated and anonymous.
cookieConsent.marketingDesc: Used to personalize content and measure the effectiveness of communications. Only enabled with your consent.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how DailyTracker collects, uses, stores and protects its users' personal data, in compliance with Brazilian Law No. 13.709/2018 (General Data Protection Law — LGPD). By using our platform, you agree to the practices described here.

sections.heading: 1. Data controller
body: DailyTracker is the controller of the personal data processed on this platform, responsible for deciding on the collection and processing of your information. For privacy-related matters, contact us at privacidade@dailytracker.app.

sections.heading: 2. Data we collect
body: We only collect the data necessary to provide and improve our services:
bullets: Account data: name and email address provided when creating your account.
Authentication data: when using Google sign-in, we receive your name, email and Google account identifier.
User content: tasks, projects, workspaces and other information you create on the platform.
Usage and technical data: IP address, browser type, pages visited and cookies, collected automatically.

sections.heading: 3. Purposes and legal bases for processing
body: We process your personal data based on the legal grounds set out in the LGPD, for the following purposes:
bullets: Performance of a contract: to create and manage your account and provide the platform's features.
Consent: to send optional communications and use non-essential cookies.
Legitimate interest: to improve security, prevent fraud and enhance the user experience.
Compliance with a legal or regulatory obligation, where applicable.

sections.heading: 4. Data sharing
body: We do not sell your personal data. We may share it with providers that help us operate the platform, always limited to what is necessary:
bullets: Infrastructure and hosting providers responsible for keeping the service running.
Google, when you choose to authenticate using your Google account.
Artificial intelligence services, when you use AI features, processing only the content sent for that purpose.
Public authorities, when required by law or court order.

sections.heading: 5. Cookies
body: We use cookies and similar technologies to operate and improve the site. You can manage your preferences at any time. For more details, see our Cookie Policy.

sections.heading: 6. Your rights as a data subject
body: Under Article 18 of the LGPD, you may exercise the following rights at any time:
bullets: Confirm the existence of processing and access your data.
Correct incomplete, inaccurate or outdated data.
Request the anonymization, blocking or deletion of unnecessary data or data processed unlawfully.
Request the portability of your data to another service provider.
Withdraw consent and request the deletion of data processed on that basis.
Obtain information about the entities with which we share your data.

sections.heading: 7. Information security
body: We adopt technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, loss, alteration or destruction, including encryption in transit and restricted access controls.

sections.heading: 8. Data retention
body: We keep your data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy or as required by law. When you delete your account, your personal data is deleted or anonymized, except where retention is legally required.

sections.heading: 9. International data transfers
body: Some of our providers may store data outside Brazil. In such cases, we ensure that the transfer complies with the LGPD and with appropriate safeguards for protection.

sections.heading: 10. Changes to this policy
body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated on the platform, and the date of the last update will always be shown at the top of this document.

sections.heading: 11. Data Protection Officer and contact
body: To exercise your rights or clarify any questions about data processing, contact our Data Protection Officer (DPO) at privacidade@dailytracker.app.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains what cookies are, how DailyTracker uses them and how you can control them. It complements our Privacy Policy and complies with the LGPD.

sections.heading: 1. What are cookies
body: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They allow the site to recognize your browser, remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.

sections.heading: 2. How we use cookies
body: We use cookies to keep you signed in, remember your preferences (such as language and theme), ensure security and understand how the platform is used so we can continuously improve it.

sections.heading: 3. Cookie categories we use
body: We classify cookies into the following categories:
bullets: Essential: indispensable to the operation of the site, such as authentication, session and security. They cannot be disabled.
Analytics: collect aggregated and anonymous information about platform usage to help us improve it.
Marketing: used to personalize content and measure the effectiveness of communications, enabled only with your consent.

sections.heading: 4. Third-party cookies
body: Some cookies may be set by third-party services we use, such as authentication and analytics providers. These third parties have their own privacy policies regarding the use of this information.

sections.heading: 5. How to manage your preferences
body: When you first access the site, you can accept all cookies, reject non-essential ones or customize your choices. You can change your preferences at any time using the button below. You can also block or delete cookies directly in your browser settings, but this may affect how the site works.

sections.heading: 6. Consent
body: Non-essential cookies are only enabled after your consent, which can be withdrawn at any time. We record your consent choices so we don't have to ask again on every visit.

sections.heading: 7. Updates to this policy
body: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. We recommend reviewing it regularly. The date of the last update is shown at the top of this document.

home.heroParagraph: The end of messy task management. Practice a clean, focused flow using Workspaces, integrated AI, and efficient management reports.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to transform the way you manage your daily demands.
home.step1Desc: Separate life contexts: work, personal, freelance. Each workspace is an independent universe with its own folders and projects.
home.step2Desc: Drag, prioritize and track. Visualize all your tasks in dynamic columns with swimlanes and customizable categories.
home.step3Desc: Request summaries, insights and sub-tasks. The integrated AI understands your backlog and synthesizes reports for each new day.
home.kanbanTitle: Complete View with our Dynamic Kanban.
home.kanbanParagraph: Abandon infinite task lists. With DailyTracker, your responsibilities are organized in clear columns (Swimlanes), categorizing what is "To Do", "In Progress" and "Done". This ensures flow and reduces your stress.
home.aiTitle: An Artificial Intelligence focused on results.
home.aiParagraph: Imagine a dedicated assistant that understands your daily backlog. The integrated AI Chat allows instant summaries, structuring of complex descriptions and even generation of sub-tasks to break a giant problem into actionable steps.
home.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about the tools and DailyTracker.
home.faq1Q: Do I need to pay to use DailyTracker?
home.faq1A: We are still in our Beta phase. Current access is free for the first users who sign up. Take advantage to set up your workflows at no cost and secure benefits in the future.
home.faq2Q: Do notifications help me remember all tasks?
home.faq2A: Yes! With our notification system and the Kanban board with due dates, you will never miss an important deadline.
home.faq3Q: Does the Artificial Intelligence analyze my performance?
home.faq3A: Our AI chat helps organize thoughts, suggest topics and our Reports Summary synthesizes what you accomplished and what still needs attention for tomorrow.
home.faq4Q: Can I separate personal projects from work?
home.faq4A: Exactly. With Multi-Workspaces and Project Folders, you have completely separate and isolated views of your life contexts.
home.ctaParagraph: Join the first users and discover how organizing professional and personal life has never been so simple.

kanban.title: Visual Kanban
kanban.description: Organize tasks in Planned, In Progress and Done columns with intuitive drag & drop.

filters.title: Smart Filters
filters.description: Filter by project, task type and date range to find exactly what you need.

ai.title: AI Assistant

notifications.title: Email Notifications
notifications.deleteRuleConfirm: Deleting this rule will cancel all pending alerts. Confirm?

welcome.title: Welcome to DailyTracker!
welcome.body: Let's take a quick 30-second tour. You can skip at any time.

sidebar.title: Navigation sidebar
sidebar.body: Here you switch between views, manage projects, task types and columns, and access reports.

workspace.title: Workspaces
workspace.body: You have a personal workspace by default. Create new workspaces to collaborate as a team and invite people to join.

projects.title: Projects and task types
projects.body: Click "Projects" to create color-coded projects. Each project can have its own task types.

new-task.title: Creating a task
new-task.body: Click "+ New Task" (or press Enter) to quickly create a task. It appears on the Kanban board instantly.

kanban.title: Your Kanban board
kanban.body: Your tasks are organized into columns. New accounts start with Planned, In Progress and Done.

columns.title: Customizable columns
columns.body: Columns are fully customizable: rename, recolor, reorder or add new ones under "Stages" in the sidebar. Mark one as final to count its tasks as completed.

drag-drop.title: Drag and drop
drag-drop.body: Drag any card and drop it into another column to change its status. You can also reorder within the same column.

ai.title: AI assistant
ai.body: Your AI assistant now lives in the "AI" tab on the edge of the screen (highlighted). Click it to create and organize tasks just by chatting.

done.title: All set!
done.body: That's everything you need to know to get started. Create your first task now!

summary.title: Daily Summary
summary.noTasks: No tasks yet. Create your first!
summary.emptySection: No tasks in this section with the active filters.
